name: Yellow Pepper Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat.
2. Add the bell peppers and shallots; cover and cook, stirring occasionally, until the peppers are very soft, about 8 to 10 minutes. Remove from the heat.
3. Place the cashews and 1-1/2 cups of vegetable stock in a blender. Blend until smooth, about 1 minute.
4. Add the cooked peppers, mustard, salt, and pepper; puree.
5. Pour the soup into a medium saucepan. Stir in the remaining 2 cups vegetable stock. Bring to a simmer over medium heat.
6. Serve hot, garnished with parsley sprigs.
